name: Bars Margetsch
description: Heya! I am full-stack software-engineer living in Oulu, Finland, with an expertise in .NET and Angular interested building awesome tools and solving problems!
noscript: I know. It's cringe. But you need to enable JavaScript to run this app, it was written in React after all (no, I am NOT rewriting it in pure html). If you really really really don't want to enable it, here's a less fancy, less cool PDF version.
